reasoning: The customer claims a wrong item was shipped, but there is no supporting evidence available on the order view. While the order is marked as Complete, there are no shipment details, item-by-item shipment confirmation, photos, or prior comments indicating a mismatch. To properly validate the claim, this request should be escalated to fulfillment/warehouse support to verify shipment records (packing slip, carrier details) and potentially request additional information or photos from the customer before issuing a refund.
